mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket ( ticket_no, business_domain_id, customer_id, ticket_type_id, title, description, status, priority, source, assigned_to, custom_fields, version, result, sla_first_response_deadline, sla_resolution_deadline, sla_first_responded_at, sla_resolved_at, sla_status, sla_paused_duration, sla_pause_started_at ) VALUES ( #{ticketNo}, #{businessDomainId}, #{customerId}, #{ticketTypeId}, #{title}, #{description}, 'open', #{priority}, #{source}, NULL, #{customFields}, 1, NULL, #{slaFirstResponseDeadline}, #{slaResolutionDeadline}, NULL, NULL, 'tracking', 0, NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.ticket_no, t.business_domain_id, d.code AS business_domain_code, d.name AS business_domain_name, t.ticket_type_id, tt.name AS ticket_type_name, t.customer_id, t.assigned_to, t.title, t.description, t.status, t.priority, t.source, t.result, t.version, CAST(t.custom_fields AS CHAR) AS custom_fields_json, t.sla_first_response_deadline, t.sla_resolution_deadline, t.sla_first_responded_at, t.sla_resolved_at, t.sla_status, t.sla_paused_duration, t.sla_pause_started_at, t.created_at, t.updated_at, ( SELECT MAX(r.created_at) FROM ticket_reply r WHERE r.ticket_id = t.id ) AS last_reply_at, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ticket_reply r WHERE r.ticket_id = t.id ), 0) AS reply_count FROM ticket t JOIN business_domain d ON d.id = t.business_domain_id JOIN ticket_type tt ON tt.id = t.ticket_type_id WHERE t.id = #{ticketId} AND t.business_domain_id = #{domainId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket SET status = #{newStatus}, version = version + 1, updated_at = #{now}, sla_first_responded_at = CASE WHEN #{newStatus} IN ('processing', 'resolved', 'closed') AND sla_first_responded_at IS NULL THEN #{now} ELSE sla_first_responded_at END, sla_resolved_at = CASE WHEN #{newStatus} IN ('resolved', 'closed') THEN COALESCE(sla_resolved_at, #{now}) ELSE sla_resolved_at END, sla_status = CASE WHEN #{newStatus} IN ('closed', 'resolved') THEN 'resolved' WHEN #{newStatus} = 'withdrawn' OR #{newStatus} = 'merged' THEN 'stopped' WHEN #{newStatus} = 'processing' THEN COALESCE(sla_status, 'tracking') ELSE sla_status END WHERE id = #{ticketId} AND version = #{version}

UPDATE ticket SET assigned_to = #{assignee}, assignee_staff_account_id = #{assignee}, status = CASE WHEN status IN ('open', 'new') THEN 'processing' ELSE status END, version = version + 1, updated_at = #{now}, sla_first_responded_at = COALESCE(sla_first_responded_at, #{now}) WHERE id = #{ticketId} AND business_domain_id = #{domainId} AND version = #{version}

UPDATE ticket SET assigned_to = #{assignee}, assignee_staff_account_id = #{assignee}, status = CASE WHEN status IN ('open', 'new') THEN 'processing' ELSE status END, version = version + 1, updated_at = #{now}, sla_first_responded_at = COALESCE(sla_first_responded_at, #{now}) WHERE id = #{ticketId} AND business_domain_id = #{domainId} AND version = #{version}

UPDATE ticket SET status = CASE WHEN #{senderType} = 'staff' AND status IN ('open', 'new') THEN 'processing' ELSE status END, version = version + 1, updated_at = #{now}, sla_first_responded_at = CASE WHEN #{senderType} = 'staff' AND sla_first_responded_at IS NULL THEN #{now} ELSE sla_first_responded_at END WHERE id = #{ticketId} AND business_domain_id = #{domainId} AND version = #{version}

UPDATE ticket SET status = 'withdrawn', result = COALESCE(result, #{reason}), sla_status = 'stopped', version = version + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{ticketId} AND business_domain_id = #{domainId} AND version = #{version}

UPDATE ticket SET status = 'merged', result = COALESCE(result, 'merged'), sla_status = 'stopped', version = version + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{ticketId} AND business_domain_id = #{domainId} AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT code FROM business_domain WHERE id = #{domainId} LIMIT 1
SELECT code FROM ticket_priority_level WHERE business_domain_id = #{domainId} AND is_default = 1 AND status = 'active' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC LIMIT 1
